svg.text: From your first scan to higher rankings — automated, transparent, proven.
Sign in with your Microsoft account — one click,
no forms, no credit card. Your website is added
Enter your domain. Our AI crawls every page in the
background. While it runs, we ask one question
to route you to the fastest fix path. ↓
Do you know what platform your site runs on?
We detect your platform from your
site's code. You see it live and
right one from a short list.
DIRECT PATH — YOU ALREADY KNOW YOUR PLATFORM
AI audits every page — full report
One-time setup — API key, OAuth token,
WordPress · Shopify · Webflow · GitHub PR flow
Fix goes live via your connected platform instantly
ALL PATHS PROCEED TO YOUR AUDIT REPORT
A full SEO report lands on your screen. Every issue is listed,
ranked by priority, with an AI-written fix ready for each one.
60+ checks · Issues ranked by impact · AI fixes included
Review each AI-generated fix and approve in one click.
You stay in full control at every step.
Platform confirmed (A, B, YES path) = instant push · Scenario D = expert
QUICK FIX — SCENARIOS A, B, YES PATH (+ C AFTER CONFIRM)
Fix pushed directly to your site — no dev work,
Fixes titles, meta descriptions, OG tags, H1 headings and more.
EXPERT HELP — SCENARIO D + COMPLEX ISSUES
For complex fixes or unknown platforms, one click
sends our team a request. We fix and confirm.
You will be notified as soon as the fix is live and verified.
Every fix is tracked in your history. Re-scan any time to find new opportunities.
Scenarios A & B — instant Quick Fix
Scenario C — confirm first, then Quick Fix
Scenario D — Expert Help handles it
YES path — direct connect & quick fix
